task_completion.description: Verify the first page has the title 'Grassland Food Web' and definitions for 'Producer', 'Consumer', and 'Decomposer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text boxes on the first page containing the title 'Grassland Food Web' and the three required definitions.

task_completion.description: Verify the second page contains the 6 required organisms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels or images representing Grass, Grasshopper, Frog, Snake, Hawk, and Fungi present on the second page.

task_completion.description: Verify the organisms on the second page are connected by at least 5 directional arrows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 5 directional arrows drawn between the organisms to show energy flow.

task_completion.description: Verify the third page contains an energy pyramid with at least 3 stacked shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pyramid structure made of at least 3 distinct stacked shapes (e.g., stacked rectangles, trapezoids, or triangles) on the third page.

task_completion.description: Verify the energy pyramid shapes are labeled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels for 'Producers', 'Primary Consumers', and 'Secondary Consumers' placed on or next to the stacked shapes.

task_completion.description: Verify the flipchart is saved with the correct filename and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the application title bar showing 'grassland_food_web.flipchart' being saved to or located in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the flipchart GUI application to create the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the UI of a presentation/flipchart software (like ActivInspire) being actively used, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the diagrams using individual shapes, text, and lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas shows distinct objects being manipulated, rather than the agent pasting a single pre-made image of a food web or pyramid from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to generate the flipchart file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run python scripts or echo commands that directly write the .flipchart file contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file is a 3-page flipchart saved as 'grassland_food_web.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. Page 1 must define Producer, Consumer, and Decomposer. Page 2 must have exactly these 6 organisms: Grass, Grasshopper, Frog, Snake, Hawk, Fungi, connected by at least 5 directional arrows. Page 3 must have an energy pyramid with at least 3 stacked shapes labeled 'Producers', 'Primary Consumers', and 'Secondary Consumers'.
